availability to travel and relocate worldwide. +34 696 66 94 54 adrian.flores@telefonica.net 24th of september, 1991 telecomunications engineer, speciality in systems and telecommunications networks. development of a synthetic aperture radar simulator for space missions. pdf link: http: //repositorio.bib.upct.es/dspace/handle/10317/4161 develop software using the matlab environment for simulating radar sar (synthetic aperture radar) type for the implementation of various space missions. simulating real missions with our application, such as the paz mission of the european space agency (esa) and performing a mission on mars developed by us (similar to mars odyssey). definition of the tracks (or stripes) to be covered, in each orbit of the satellite. calculation of: prf (pulse repetition frequency), for each sub-trace, lengths of oblique distances, sub-tracks and overlays (of these) with each other, the width in azimuth, of the sub-prints, the minimum reception window, by sub-trace, minimum number of received echoes for each of the sub-tracks, in flat geometry. knowledge acquired: sar, scansar, stripmap, iff, ssr, nesz. researcher in the field of sdn (fpi scolarship). ph.d thesis: "cooperative intelligence schemes for future internet emerging technologies". project development: "transmission systems associated with remote control (scada) in water infrastructure". the control center was equiped with a uhf / vhf radio equipment, for communication with remote stations, a gprs router, for redundant communication with remote station and plc (programmable logic programmer) front-end. project development: "treatment of data from lidar (laser) and comparison with those obtained in systems of synthetic aperture radar (sar), to capture data on land distributed in space missions". the purpose of this study was to compare the two existing modes for the capture of data (from de aispace) of distributed targets, to a greater or lesser extent, and once these captured data have been obtained, proceed to the processing of the received signals, in order to faithfully reproduce the detail of the illuminated or studied area. employed methods: sar and lidar. project development: interactivity and error control platform logistics and traceability. it knowledge. master project programming languages languages spanish english technical english catalan french personal skills personal interests training courses publications 22017 22016 doppler, cw, pulses,azimut, power, gain, band designation, radiation pattern, efecctive area, mds. matlab, java, c, c ++, python, vhdl (xilinx fpga type systems), latex, fiber card, orcad, assembly language, hfss, microwin programs, stk. management linux user-level systems programmer and administrator. management with windows operating systems and related office applications. developping p2p topologies (chord, pastry), familiar with ryu and openstack, mininet and oracle. mother language. high fluent (speaking, writing, listening, reading). full professional proficiency. bilingual. basic (speaking, listening), intermediate (writing, reading). possess great communication, writing and social skills. the training have received throughout my life has given me a high capacity for teamwork in multicultural environments. thanks to my criticism, logical thinking and decisive personality, am an organized person, able to find solutions and alternatives to the most complex problems. am very hardworking and am attracted to the challenges that require the best of my efforts. space mission development, european space agency, nasa, astronomy, sports (currently coaching a basketball team), new technologies, languages, travelling.
